summary:
This joint resolution disapproves, under the Congressional Review Act in chapter 8 of title 5 of the United States Code, a rule submitted by the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management titled “Protection of Marine Archaeological Resources,” published in the Federal Register on September 3, 2024, at 89 Fed. Reg. 71160.

The resolution provides that Congress does not approve the rule and that the rule shall have no force or effect. As a result, the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management’s rule on protection of marine archaeological resources is nullified.

The resolution was approved on March 14, 2025.
